text: I am here on vacation. I am staying for one week.
Now I am at my hotel. I go to reception.

Do you have a room for one week?
Good evening. Welcome to the Garden Hotel. Do you have a reservation?
Good evening. Yes, I have a reservation for a double room.
Thank you. What is your name, please?
My name is Gabriela Paulucci. I would like the room for one week.
Perfect. Here is your key card. Your room is on the third floor. The lift is over there.
Thank you. Do you have breakfast in the morning?
Yes, breakfast is on the first floor. Enjoy your stay.
Do you have breakfast in the morning?
My room is on the third floor.
I take the lift to my room.

Welcome to the Garden Hotel. Here is some information for our guests. Check-in is at reception on the ground floor. Please have your reservation ready. Your room key card opens your room and the lift. Breakfast is on the first floor, from seven to ten. The lift is next to reception. We hope you enjoy your stay with us.

Hi, I am Gabriela. Now I am at my hotel in London. I am at reception, and I am a little tired after my flight. The receptionist asks for my name and my reservation. I have a reservation for one double room for one week. The receptionist gives me a key card and tells me my room is on the third floor. I take the lift, and I am very happy. My trip starts now.

First, Gabriela arrives at the hotel and walks to reception. Then she says she has a reservation for a double room. After that, the receptionist asks for her name and gives her a key card. Next, the receptionist tells her the room is on the third floor. Finally, Gabriela takes the lift to her room.
